item.title: Defense Force, National Treasure, Spragga Ben
item.ns0:title: Defense Force, National Treasure, Spragga Ben
item.description:
Tonight on Our News, authorities in Bimini investigate the tragic death of a man following a high-voltage electrical accident at a local business. We celebrate a historic milestone for the Royal Bahamas Defense Force as a record number of new marines join the front lines to meet growing security challenges. A pioneering champion for women's rights is sworn into a prestigious national office, and we bring you an exclusive sit-down with a legendary reggae star reflecting on his iconic career. Stay tuned for these highlights, a look back at our nation's evolution from a founding independence planner, and your complete sports and weather updates.
-----
Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for "fair use" for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education and research. Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statute that might otherwise be infringing.
item.ns1:encoded:
Tonight on Our News, authorities in Bimini investigate the tragic death of a man following a high-voltage electrical accident at a local business. We celebrate a historic milestone for the Royal Bahamas Defense Force as a record number of new marines join the front lines to meet growing security challenges. A pioneering champion for women's rights is sworn into a prestigious national office, and we bring you an exclusive sit-down with a legendary reggae star reflecting on his iconic career. Stay tuned for these highlights, a look back at our nation's evolution from a founding independence planner, and your complete sports and weather updates.
-----

item.ns0:summary:
Tonight on Our News, authorities in Bimini investigate the tragic death of a man following a high-voltage electrical accident at a local business. We celebrate a historic milestone for the Royal Bahamas Defense Force as a record number of new marines join the front lines to meet growing security challenges. A pioneering champion for women's rights is sworn into a prestigious national office, and we bring you an exclusive sit-down with a legendary reggae star reflecting on his iconic career. Stay tuned for these highlights, a look back at our nation's evolution from a founding independence planner, and your complete sports and weather updates.

item.ns0:author: Our News Bahamas
